message:
feat(fcp-host): add mesh status, policy engine status, and host diagnostics types

Extend discovery module with MeshStatus, PolicyEngineStatus,
ConnectorStateCounts, and HostDiagnostics for accurate health
reporting per oip0 checklist. HostDiagnostics.aggregate_status()
computes overall health from mesh, policy, and connector signals.

27 new tests, 1485 total fcp-host lib tests, all clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
